<!-- Thanks for filing a bug report — the more context you can give, the faster we
can reproduce and fix it. Fill out every section, even if some feel obvious. -->

## 🐛 Bug description

<!-- A clear, concise description of what the bug is. -->

## 🔁 Reproduction steps

<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior. Provide enough detail that someone else
can follow them on a fresh checkout. -->

1.
2.
3.
4.

## ✅ Expected behavior

<!-- What you expected to happen. -->

## ❌ Actual behavior

<!-- What actually happened. Include error logs, screenshots, or a short
recording if relevant — drag-and-drop into the comment area below. -->

## 🧩 Environment

<!-- All Knighters Manager runs on six platforms; the same code can misbehave
on different ones, so please fill in the platform + Flutter version that
you observed the bug on. -->

- **Platform:** <!-- web (Chrome / Safari / Firefox), Android, iOS, Linux, macOS, Windows -->
- **App version / commit SHA:** <!-- output of `git rev-parse HEAD` if you built from source -->
- **Flutter version:** <!-- output of `flutter --version` -->
- **Dart version:** <!-- output of `flutter --version`, second line -->
- **Device:** <!-- e.g. Pixel 7, M2 MacBook Air, iPhone 15, … -->

## 📋 Additional context

<!-- Anything else that might help — recent changes you made, related issues
(`#123`), partial workarounds you discovered, screenshots before/after. -->

## 🛠 Possible fix

<!-- Optional — if you have a hunch about where the bug lives in the code,
mention a file path or function name from `lib/`. Totally fine to leave blank. -->
